scripts.init:arduino: arduino-cli config init --overwrite && arduino-cli config add board_manager.additional_urls https://github.com/ambiot/ambd_arduino/raw/master/Arduino_package/package_realtek_amebad_index.json && arduino-cli core update-index && arduino-cli core install realtek:AmebaD@3.1.7
scripts.all-in-one: bun run build && bun run upload --port /dev/ttyUSB0 && stty -F /dev/ttyUSB0 115200
